final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic concept art, wide panoramic
Primary request: panoramic view of a Mars colony in 2387 with transparent dome cities, solar arrays, and terraforming structures
Scene/backdrop: Martian red desert landscape, Olympus Mons visible in the distance, orange-red Martian sky
Subject: massive transparent geodesic dome city with lush vegetation and high-rise buildings inside, giant solar collection arrays and atmospheric processors operating outside, team of explorers in advanced spacesuits conducting geological surveys, multiple six-wheeled Mars rovers
Style/medium: photorealistic CGI, hard sci-fi aesthetic, realistic rendering
Composition/framing: wide panoramic shot, establishing view showing scale and depth
Lighting/mood: Martian daylight simulation, dramatic atmospheric haze, epic and futuristic
Color palette: ochre red, orange-yellow, silver-gray, muted Martian tones
Materials/textures: transparent polymer dome surfaces, metallic solar panels, dusty red regolith, advanced composite spacesuit materials
Constraints: maintain scientific accuracy for Mars environment, keep Olympus Mons visible in background, preserve hard sci-fi realism
Avoid: fantasy elements, Earth-like blue sky, cartoonish proportions, lens flare abuse, watermark
